desc:
PRINTED PROGRAM — approved by the elders' committee 2026-07-05 (authoritative).
Guest-preacher lineup: Bishop L.D. Holloway (keynote sermon); Rev. Thomas B. Williams (morning devotion); Dr. Olivia Grant (scripture and prayer).
Order of service: 1) Processional and Call to Worship; 2) Opening Hymn - Great Is Thy Faithfulness; 3) Scripture Reading and Invocation; 4) Anniversary Choir Selection; 5) Guest Sermon - Bishop L.D. Holloway; 6) Offering and Commemorative Book Presentation; 7) Closing Hymn and Benediction.
Treasurer tally (manual card, last updated two pay cycles ago): anniversary fund raised = $7,450. NOTE: this tally is stale; reconcile against the Xero anniversary-fund deposit records.
Anniversary budget line held by the committee treasurer: $12,000.
name: 75th Anniversary Program
